plays.summary: Juan Mejia is at 3.66 xFIP — above average — going up against a near league average SDP lineup (102 wRC+). Tough spot for SDP's bats. The park (PF 95) gives pitchers an extra edge, and both lineups grade below average (COL 91 / SDP 102 wRC+). No line yet — model is at 7.6 runs. Watch for a under when odds open.
